items.title: Deep learning image classification
items.description: CNNs train with Keras EarlyStopping on val/accuracy — patience tuned to dataset size, restore_best_weights=True before exporting ONNX for inference.

items.title: Tabular fraud detection with XGBoost
items.description: Boosted trees add rounds until val/logloss stops improving for early_stopping_rounds; production models predict with best_iteration only.

items.title: NLP transformer fine-tuning
items.description: Fine-tuning BERT on a small labeled set uses validation F1 curves — early stopping prevents catastrophic overfit when train loss keeps falling on memorized tokens.

items.title: Time-series forecasting with RNNs
items.description: LSTM training monitors val/rmse each epoch on a temporally held-out validation slice — stops before the model overfits recent training windows.

items.title: Recommendation ranker training
items.description: Neural rankers log val/ndcg each epoch in an experiment tracker — patience stops training when ranking quality plateaus on held-out user sessions.

items.title: AutoML hyperparameter search
items.description: Search frameworks wrap each trial with early stopping on validation loss — reducing wasted epochs across hundreds of architecture and learning-rate candidates.
